docs.title: Introduction
docs.text: A collection of 3D printed mounts and hangers for garage tools designed to mount to a horizontal 1x4 or 2x4 board. There's mounts for things like shovels, rakes, hedge trimmers, etc.

docs.title: Installation notes
docs.text:
There is a lot of variability of boards dimensions so the mounts might not fit snug on some. But you want the printed part to hold the weight, not the screw.

To help with this, press the mount downward while tightening the screw.And don't use countersink screws, they'll lift the mount away from the board. Also, purposely angling the screw against the bottom of the hole helps as well.

docs.title: Circular Tool Mount
docs.text:
Originally designed for a pole hedge trimmer, this mount works good for any tool with a circular profile. The opening is 1" in diameter, max should diameter is around 2".

Download STL

docs.title: Universal Hook
docs.text:
This is a general purpose mount, ideal for rakes, brooms, snow shovels, etc.

Download STL

docs.title: Request new designs
docs.text: To request new mounts, or to add your own, open an issue on the github page (link in the left pane)
